Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. COLIN W. LARSON of Bledsoe, Cathcart, Diestel, Pedersen & Treppa LLP, Tel No. (415) 981-5411 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. ELIZABETH A. ENGLAND of Morris Polich & Purdy LLP, Tel No. (415) 984-8500 appearing for Defendants 215-1 - 215-2 - 217 Cole Street Homeowners Association.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS 215-1 - 215-2 - 217 COLE STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Arbitration is denied. As shown in pages 7-10 of Plaintiff's brief, "there is a possibility of conflicting rulings on issues of law or fact." CCP sec. 1281.2(c). This is particularly so as the Contractors would not participate in the arbitration. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/RBU)
